signatureMove.name: Hamstring
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If the enemy suffered 1 or more Wds during this round of Melee, they gain Slow and cannot take Step Actions or Reaction Steps until end of turn.

abilities.name: Dagger
abilities.description: If this character deals Piercing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

abilities.name: Flea Infested Pelt
abilities.description: Reduce Magical and Slicing Dmg suffered by -1.

abilities.name: Honour Amongst Thieves
abilities.description: Friendly Rogues within 6" gain +1 Arcane Stat.

abilities.name: Sneaking
abilities.description: This character gets -2 Evade Stat until end of turn.

abilities.name: Squeaking
abilities.description: Move target enemy 1". Reaction Steps cannot be declared in response to this action.

abilities.name: Robbery
abilities.description: Target model with less Wds remaining than this character loses possession of one Moonstone and this character gains possession of that Moonstone.

abilities.name: Sewer Rat
abilities.description: You may only play this ability if Muridae is inside a building. This character is Removed From Play. At the start of the next Replenish Step, return this character to play inside any building.
